name: PizzaPanic
short_description: People are starving for Pizza! Become our new delivery operator. Race through the city with your trusty courier bot, and bring joy to your customers. Customize your robot and experiment with dozens of unique skills and upgrades. Bring your friends and enjoy chaos in online and local multiplayer.
detailed_description:
Now hiring new Pizza Delivery Bot Operators effective immediately. Dash into racing madness with PizzaPanic, a new exciting multiplayer party game. Strap on your whiskers and take control of a lightning-fast robot courier eager to satisfy hungry customers. Rage through traffic in large open islands and become the fastest pizza delivery operator in town.

Bring your friends and elevate the pizza delivery chaos to a whole new level. Race with 4 players locally or online, and find out who's the fastest and the most ingenious operator. Sabotage opponents and finetune your strategy in an epic showdown for pizza supremacy. Renew the experience with a wide range of game modes and islands, making every game a new challenge.

Customize your delivery robot with tons of different parts and make it your own. PizzaPanic is about speed but also about ingenuity. Spend your hard earned money and choose between dozens of skills and upgrades to create your own playstyle. Experiment with endless combinations and find your unique way of defeating your opponents.
